visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with dark brown curly hair and bangs, wearing white over-ear headphones and a white square-neck top, stands in a kitchen environment. She is looking down with a focused expression, her eyes fixed on a bunch of green herbs in her hands. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the clean white tiled background and her white garment. (2) Her hands perform a rhythmic and precise motion of plucking individual leaves from the stems. She holds the main bunch in her left hand while her right hand pinches and pulls the leaves. Each leaf is carefully placed into a shallow white ceramic bowl sitting on the kitchen counter to her right. (3) The subject continues the task, with the pile of leaves in the bowl visibly increasing. The camera maintains a static, eye-level medium close-up shot, capturing the detail of the green herbs and the micro-actions of her fingers. The background remains consistent, featuring kitchen cabinetry and tiled surfaces in a bright, neutral domestic setting.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a kitchen setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with curly hair wearing a white square-neck blouse and white over-ear headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white square tiles on the wall, a kitchen vent hood, and a white countertop with a ceramic bowl.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A sharp, crisp snapping sound occurs with high frequency prominence and a rapid decay, indicating the breaking of a fresh plant stem. There are no human vocals or background music present. The ambient noise floor is exceptionally low, resembling a controlled studio environment or a very quiet room tone. (2) A second snapping sound is heard, followed by a faint rustling noise as the leaves are handled. The acoustic signature is bright and dry, with no significant reverb. The focus remains entirely on the incidental mechanical sounds of the manual activity, with no vocalization or tonal musical elements. (3) A series of three quick, successive snaps occur, each varying slightly in pitch and intensity. These sounds are transient and have a clean spectral profile. The recording maintains a high signal-to-noise ratio, with no interference from outside environment or electronic equipment hum. No music or speech is audible. (4) A final sequence of two snaps and the soft sound of a leaf landing on a ceramic surface is heard. The sounds are distinct and isolated within the soundstage. The acoustic experience is purely sensory and focused on the rhythmic repetition of the physical task, devoid of any vocal or melodic content.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a sensory ASMR content piece, focusing on the visual and auditory details of herb preparation. By isolating the crisp sounds of plucking leaves and providing a clean, bright visual aesthetic, it aims to provide a relaxing and satisfying experience for viewers interested in culinary micro-tasks.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical short-form ASMR clip focusing on organic textures and sounds.
